TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Li-se-pen ťáĆśĖĮśú¨ == Li-se-pen " kamu nu Pu-taw-ya "Lisboa(li í'bo…ź) , u Pu-cin, Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo a suotu atu satabakiay nu tukay, u tatelungan nu cen-ce a kanatal, malasihu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatal a lumaan. kakitidaan itida i Pu-taw-ya teban timulan nu Ta-si-yeng dadipasan, tukay nu amis u Sin-te'-la buyu', timulan nu tukay u Te'-zu sa'wac nu tatahkalan, atu Lun-tun, Pa-li, Luo-ma sakalecad u Si-o satenesay nu likisian a tukayan. kitidaan nu macimacian 100.05 pin-fan-kun-li, tademaw 544,851 ku tademaw. pasu Wi-sin-cen a tukayan nu tademaw malakuuyt tu 300 wang nu tademawan, mahida u Pu-taw-ya tademaw a 27%. ayda atu Puo-e-tu masulecad u Pu-taw-ya nu tusaay a dayhiwan nu tukay. Li-se-pen u tukay atu ce-cya-se, u kakitidaan nu sihu atu luma' nu tapan a kanatal. Pu-taw-ya-yi kanatal kapulungan nu hunbu itida i niyadu' nuheni, u O-cuo-ta-lu satipan a suo-tu, itida i Ta-si-yen dadipasan. (CPLP) . Li-se-pen u ginku, papacakayan, pasingbungay, nalimaan, kanatal nu sasiwbayan, cyawyi atu laliwkuan a satapangan, sipakayda i kitakit atu kanatalan nu tukay nikinkiwan tu wanlu "GaWC" a nihapuan " kitakit nu tukay" a nganganan, sipasilac u ALPHA-ci a kanatal nu tukay, u O-cuo-ta-lu a angangan nu tatelungan a sakaudip, Li-se-pen-kan u O-cuo-ta-si-yeng dadipasan nu satabakiay a minatuan. Namahida, Li-se-pen pahikukian itida i tusepcaywal mihcaah miala tu tusiwsepsep nu taydaay a tademaw, u Pu-taw-ya sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukiay, Yi-pi-li-pan-daw sakatulu nu sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukian atu O-cuo tu saka tusep nu sainai'ay nu lawdan a pahikukiay. (GaWC) ALPHA- . Li-se-pen u Na-o saka siwa nu taydaay musakamuay a satabakiay nu tukayan, mikilul tu Yi-se-tan-paw, Luo-ma, Pa-say-lung-na, Mi-lan, Ya-tin, Wi-ni-se, Ma-te-li atu Fuo-luo-lun-se, tusepcaywal mihcaan, Li-se-pen nu taydaay midang a tademaw makaala tu 3,539,400 ku tademaw. kitidaan nu Li-se-pen a GDP picakayan mikitalakaw tu Pu-taw-ya duma nu niyadu'an. pulung nu sakasilaculan 963 yi menyen. pulung nu siwkac saka sepat a bataan. Pu-taw-ya miawasay a kusi a hunbu itida namin i Li-se-pen niyadu'an. GDP . Li-se-pen i kitakit u satenesay a tukayan, saka tusa nu sumamaday nu O-cuo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu aydaay nu O-cuo matabal tu pina a se-ci a nikaadihan. picidekan u U-se. Kay-sa ku panganganay " Felicitas julia" imi u " palipahak Kay-sa" kainaian tu nu Luo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka lima a seci lingatu, Li-se-pen a silacan Ze-e-man niyadu' ku mikuwanay, nikuda sa itida i walu a secian hiyan nu Muo-e tademaw midebung, caycaysippic mihcaan, A-fan-suo ise debungan kina tukay, namakayda i Li-se-pen hida satu u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, sakaudip atu tatelungan nu lalangawan. "Felicitas Julia"(śĄŹÁāļ" . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ namaka sin-se-ci zitay malingatu, Li-se-pen a kitidaan idaw tuku Yi-pi-li tademaw tuda mueneng, satabalay a tayniay nu tademaw u Fei-ni-ci tademaw. yu tuseplim mihcaan u Luo-ma-kun-he-kuo ku mikuwanay, tayaay mikuwanay ci Kay-sa pacakaten nida kina kitidaan malase', pangangan han u "Felicitasjulia" imi u " kalipahak Kay-sa", nika makatukuh tu kunyen lima a seci kakilukilul sa debungan nu Man-cu. "Felicitas Julia" . . kunyen piccaycay mihcaan, namaka pea-fuy a Muo-e tademaw midebung i Yi-pi-li pantaw, midebung tu Li-se-pen. palutatengaan tu Tapangan u Yi-se-lan-cyaw a Muo-e tademaw itida i maci patideng tu yadahay nu Cin-cen-se, patideng tu yadahay nu lumaan atu baluhay a cabeng. pikuwanan nu Yi-se-lan-cyaw, macakat tu ku sakaudip nu macimacian, mila itiniay u tapang nu minatuan, imahini, macian nu tademaw caay namin kalecad ku palutatengaan tu Tapang idaw ku kilisetu, Mu-se-lin atu Yiw-tay tademaw. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉ711ŚĻī, . caycaysippic mihcaan, Pu-taw-ya kuowan ci A-fun mililid tu hitay mi'dis tu Muo-e- tademaw, u Li-se-pen mutiku aca tu kilisetu. caytulimnem mihcaan, Li-se-pen mula Pu-taw-ya a suo-tu, hida satu mapatideng mala O-cuo atu -Ti-cun-hay tapang nu tataydaan misiwbay a tukayan. i kitidaan katinengan, katuud ku paculilay tu nu bayu a balungaan pasu ci Wa-se-ke.D.Cya-ma-tu u Li-se-pen malingand katukuh i kitakit nu caayay kalecad nu tataydaan mitahaw, sisa, katukuh tu sabaw tu enem a seci sakacelakan ku Li-se-pen tayaw, yadahay nu kiman itawya namaka Pu-taw-ya a mabulaway nu tademw nu Pa-si katukuh i Li-se-pen, itini kasi'puca u kaysing ku masangaay, sisa u Li-se-pen mala O-cuo u tatelungan nu pacakayay. 1147ŚĻī, . caylimsepnem mihcaan sepat bulad sabaw siwa demiad, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu kawaw tu Yiw-tay tademaw a militabat, maala ku 4000 nu tademawan makaala tu palasepaten nu cacayay ku mapatayay nu Yiw-tay a tademawan. caylimlucay mihcaan cacay bulad tuenem demiad, idaw ku tabakiay nu ninel i Li-se-pen . caylimwalsep mihcaan Si-pan-ya Ha-pu-se-paw-wancaw mikuwan tu Pu-taw-ya wanwi miduduc malepacaw, u Si-pan-ya a hitay midebung tu Li-se-pen, Si-pan-ya kuowan ci Fuy-li-pu ese mikutay mala Pu-taw-ya a kuowan, misakaput u Si-pan-ya ti-kuo ku sikawaway a Kun-cu-lan-pan Yi-pi-li lenmun, ya lenmun sadikuday u Pu-taw-ya itida i caynemsipsep mihcaan misiteked sa mabulesak. 1506ŚĻī4śúą19śó•, . caypiclimlim mihcaan, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu ninelan i O-cuo makaala tu siw a ci nu pihacengay nu ninel, makatuduh atu cabiyasan nu bayu makaala tu cacay a bataan nu wang ku mapatayay a tademaw, picidekan i Li-se-pen idaw ku siwa a wangan nu tademaw a mapatay, u tukay atu minatu ku pihacengay, pasuLi-wi-la-kun atu singanganay nu tuudan, kiwkay, aadihan tu cudad a luma' u luma' tu, kanahatu nu caayay ka luyuh nu ninelan ku lumaa' sadikuday caay tu pakaput tu lamal a nipipesengan, hida satu ku Li-se-pen a caay tu lekal, Pu-taw-ya kanatal hida satu malingatu a nai' ku laheci. 1755ŚĻī, . nipatidengan tu nadikudan a Li-se-pen, misaahebal tu putah, dadan, u Kuo-wan atu Suo-sin miawda tu katuuday nu misangaay tu luma' atu matinengay mikulitay patideng tu tatelungan nu maci, nika hini pabaluhay mikiyaku tu tukay, patideng tu baluhay a Pan-pa-e-se nu sangaan hidan u wayway nu lala' a misanga tu talakaw apuyu nu silacan, u Luo-ke-ke atu Sin-ku-ten cuyi ku sapatumi', nika sadayumen, palacacay han nu hakuna, nipisangaan tu lumaan kacan pacukedan tu sakacaay ka talaw nu ninelan. . sabaw siwa tu lingatu, ci Na-puo'-lun yise palekal tu pantaw kalepacawan midis tu Si-pan-ya atu Pu-taw-ya, Fa-kuo hitay mialaw tu Ma-te-li katukuh i Li-se-pen, tawyaay a tahudan yada tu namin milaliw taydan i Pa-si, u macimacian mamin tu a mapeci malawpes.caysiwcaysep mihecaan cacay a bataaan bulad tulu demiad, Li-se-pen palekal tu nikalepacawan, belihen ku cun-cu-ce, lima demiad kun-he-tan tademaw itida i Li-se-pen mihapu mapatineng tu ku Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo. sakatusa nu nikalepacawan, Li-se-pen mibuhat tu adidiay nu Ta-si-yeng minatu a tukayan. ayda u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, tatelungan nu lalangawan, satabakiay nu minatuan atu satabakiay nu tukayan. Śú®19šłĖÁīÄŚąĚ, . caysiwpicsip mihcaan Li-se-pen mapalekal ku Kan-nay-si kemin, mapatideng tu ku Pu-taw-ya a lihalayay. caysiwwallu mihcaan, Pei-lun-ta atu Ze-nuo-ni-muo siwtawyen mala kitakit nu nababalakian a lalangawan. caysiwsiwwal mihcaan, sikawaw ku Li-se-pen tu kitakit nu Pu-lan-huy, sapatingakay u " bayu, anu ayaway a zaysang", pasitungus tu Li-se-pen bayuay a tukayan. nipatingakay nu Puo-lan-huy caylutu demiad, pulung han nu tadaay a tademaw makaala tu cacay a malebut ku taydaay miadih. 1974 .
S.PHON: == r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn *** == r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn " kamu nu pu-taw-ja "r~…ĺisboa(r~…ĺi* Ē~ °bo*) , u pu- ¶in, pu-taw-ja-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a suotu atu satabakiaj nu tukaj, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺasińßu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺumaan. kakitidaan itida i pu-taw-ja t…ôban timur~…ĺan nu ta-si-j…ôŇč dadipasan, tukaj nu amis u sin-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa buju Ē~ °, timur~…ĺan nu tukaj u t…ô Ē~ °-zu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu tatańßkar~…ĺan, atu r~…ĺun-tun, pa-r~…ĺi, r~…ĺuo-ma sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u si-o sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…ĺikisian a tukajan. kitidaan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian ***.** pin-fan-kun-r~…ĺi, tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw. pasu wi-sin- ¶…ôn a tukajan nu tad…ômaw mar~…ĺakuujt tu *** waŇč nu tad…ômawan, mańßida u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw a **%. ajda atu puo-…ô-tu masur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u pu-taw-ja nu tusaaj a dajńßiwan nu tukaj. r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn u tukaj atu ¶…ô- ¶ja-s…ô, u kakitidaan nu sińßu atu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tapan a kanatar~…ĺ. pu-taw-ja-ji kanatar~…ĺ kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu ńßunbu itida i nijadu Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…ĺu satipan a suo-tu, itida i ta-si-j…ôn dadipasan. ( ¶pr~…ĺp) . r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn u ginku, papa ¶akajan, pasiŇčbuŇčaj, nar~…ĺimaan, kanatar~…ĺ nu sasiwbajan, ¶jawji atu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwkuan a satapaŇčan, sipakajda i kitakit atu kanatar~…ĺan nu tukaj nikinkiwan tu wanr~…ĺu "gaw ¶" a nińßapuan " kitakit nu tukaj" a ŇčaŇčanan, sipasir~…ĺa ¶ u ar~…ĺpńßa- ¶i a kanatar~…ĺ nu tukaj, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…ĺu a aŇčaŇčan nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan a sakaudip, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn-kan u o- ¶uo-ta-si-j…ôŇč dadipasan nu satabakiaj a minatuan. namańßida, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn pańßikukian itida i tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aańß miar~…ĺa tu tusiws…ôps…ôp nu tajdaaj a tad…ômaw, u pu-taw-ja sanaiaj nu r~…ĺawadan a pańßikukiaj, ji-pi-r~…ĺi-pan-daw sakatur~…ĺu nu sanaiaj nu r~…ĺawadan a pańßikukian atu o- ¶uo tu saka tus…ôp nu sainai Ē~ °aj nu r~…ĺawdan a pańßikukiaj. (gaw ¶) ar~…ĺpńßa- . r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn u na-o saka siwa nu tajdaaj musakamuaj a satabakiaj nu tukajan, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ji-s…ô-tan-paw, r~…ĺuo-ma, pa-saj-r~…ĺuŇč-na, mi-r~…ĺan, ja-tin, wi-ni-s…ô, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi atu fuo-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺun-s…ô, tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn nu tajdaaj midaŇč a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw. kitidaan nu r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a gdp pi ¶akajan mikitar~…ĺakaw tu pu-taw-ja duma nu nijadu Ē~ °an. pur~…ĺuŇč nu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan *** ji m…ônj…ôn. pur~…ĺuŇč nu siwka ¶ saka s…ôpat a bataan. pu-taw-ja miawasaj a kusi a ńßunbu itida namin i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an. gdp . r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn i kitakit u sat…ôn…ôsaj a tukajan, saka tusa nu sumamadaj nu o- ¶uo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu ajdaaj nu o- ¶uo matabar~…ĺ tu pina a s…ô- ¶i a nikaadińßan. pi ¶id…ôkan u u-s…ô. kaj-sa ku paŇčaŇčanaj " f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itas jur~…ĺia" imi u " par~…ĺipańßak kaj-sa" kainaian tu nu r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶i r~…ĺiŇčatu, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a sir~…ĺa ¶an z…ô-…ô-man nijadu Ē~ ° ku mikuwanaj, nikuda sa itida i war~…ĺu a s…ô ¶ian ńßijan nu muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč, ¶aj ¶ajsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan, a-fan-suo is…ô d…ôbuŇčan kina tukaj, namakajda i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn ńßida satu u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. "f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itas *ur~…ĺia"(**" . r~…ĺikisi ** namaka sin-s…ô- ¶i zitaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a kitidaan idaw tuku ji-pi-r~…ĺi tad…ômaw tuda mu…ôn…ôŇč, satabar~…ĺaj a tajniaj nu tad…ômaw u f…ôi-ni- ¶i tad…ômaw. ju tus…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan u r~…ĺuo-ma-kun-ńß…ô-kuo ku mikuwanaj, tajaaj mikuwanaj ¶i kaj-sa pa ¶akat…ôn nida kina kitidaan mar~…ĺas…ô Ē~ °, paŇčaŇčan ńßan u "f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itasjur~…ĺia" imi u " kar~…ĺipańßak kaj-sa", nika makatukuńß tu kunj…ôn r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶i kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa d…ôbuŇčan nu man- ¶u. ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw a muo-…ô tad…ômaw itida i ma ¶i patid…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô, patid…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu r~…ĺumaan atu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ¶ab…ôŇč. pikuwanan nu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw, ma ¶akat tu mir~…ĺitabat, maar~…ĺa ku **** nu tad…ômawan makaar~…ĺa tu par~…ĺas…ôpat…ôn nu ¶a ¶ajaj ku mapatajaj nu jiw-taj a tad…ômawan. ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad tu…ôn…ôm d…ômiad, idaw ku siw a ¶i nu pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu nin…ôr~…ĺ, makatuduńß atu ¶abijasan nu baju makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu waŇč ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, pi ¶id…ôkan i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku siwa a waŇčan nu tad…ômaw a mapataj, u tukaj atu minatu ku pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj, pasur~…ĺi-wi-r~…ĺa-kun atu siŇčaŇčanaj nu tuudan, kiwkaj, aadińßan tu ¶udad a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu, kanańßatu nu ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺujuńß nu nin…ôr~…ĺan ku r~…ĺumaa Ē~ ° sadikudaj ¶aaj tu pakaput tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ a nipip…ôs…ôŇčan, ńßida satu ku r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a ¶aaj tu r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, pu-taw-ja kanatar~…ĺ ńßida satu mar~…ĺiŇčatu a nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. *****, . nipatid…ôŇčan tu nadikudan a r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn, misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu putańß, dadan, u kuo-wan atu suo-sin miawda tu katuudaj nu misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu matin…ôŇčaj mikur~…ĺitaj patid…ôŇč tu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶i, nika ńßini pabar~…ĺuńßaj mikijaku tu tukaj, patid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a pan-pa-…ô-s…ô nu saŇčaan ńßidan u wajwaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a misaŇča tu tar~…ĺakaw apuju nu sir~…ĺa ¶an, u r~…ĺuo-k…ô-k…ô atu sin-ku-t…ôn ¶uji ku sapatumi Ē~ °, nika sadajum…ôn, par~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj ńßan nu ńßakuna, nipisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺumaan ka ¶an pa ¶uk…ôdan tu saka ¶aaj ka tar~…ĺaw nu nin…ôr~…ĺan. . sabaw siwa tu r~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶i na-puo Ē~ °-r~…ĺun jis…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu pantaw kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan midis tu si-pan-ja atu pu-taw-ja, fa-kuo ńßitaj miar~…ĺaw tu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi katukuńß i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn, tawjaaj a tańßudan jada tu namin mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajdan i pa-si, u ma ¶ima ¶ian mamin tu a map…ô ¶i mar~…ĺawp…ôs. ¶ajsiw ¶ajs…ôp mińß…ô ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataaan bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu d…ômiad, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, b…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn ku ¶un- ¶u- ¶…ô, r~…ĺima d…ômiad kun-ńß…ô-tan tad…ômaw itida i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mińßapu mapatin…ôŇč tu ku pu-taw-ja-kun-ńß…ô-kuo. sakatusa nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mibuńßat tu adidiaj nu ta-si-j…ôŇč minatu a tukajan. ajda u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, satabakiaj nu minatuan atu satabakiaj nu tukajan. ******, . ¶ajsiwpi ¶sip mińß ¶aan r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku kan-naj-si k…ômin, mapatid…ôŇč tu ku pu-taw-ja a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj. ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, p…ôi-r~…ĺun-ta atu z…ô-nuo-ni-muo siwtawj…ôn mar~…ĺa kitakit nu nababar~…ĺakian a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶ajsiwsiwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, sikawaw ku r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn tu kitakit nu pu-r~…ĺan-ńßuj, sapatiŇčakaj u " baju, anu ajawaj a zajsaŇč", pasituŇčus tu r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn bajuaj a tukajan. nipatiŇčakaj nu puo-r~…ĺan-ńßuj ¶ajr~…ĺutu d…ômiad, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan nu tadaaj a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku tajdaaj miadińß. **** .
S.FORM: == Li-se-pen ťáĆśĖĮśú¨ == Li-se-pen " kamu nu Pu-taw-ya "Lisboa(li í'bo…ź) , u Pu-cin, Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo a suotu atu satabakiay nu tukay, u tatelungan nu cen-ce a kanatal, malasihu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatal a lumaan. kakitidaan itida i Pu-taw-ya teban timulan nu Ta-si-yeng dadipasan, tukay nu amis u Sin-te'-la buyu', timulan nu tukay u Te'-zu sa'wac nu tatahkalan, atu Lun-tun, Pa-li, Luo-ma sakalecad u Si-o satenesay nu likisian a tukayan. kitidaan nu macimacian 100.05 pin-fan-kun-li, tademaw 544,851 ku tademaw. pasu Wi-sin-cen a tukayan nu tademaw malakuuyt tu 300 wang nu tademawan, mahida u Pu-taw-ya tademaw a 27%. ayda atu Puo-e-tu masulecad u Pu-taw-ya nu tusaay a dayhiwan nu tukay. Li-se-pen u tukay atu ce-cya-se, u kakitidaan nu sihu atu luma' nu tapan a kanatal. Pu-taw-ya-yi kanatal kapulungan nu hunbu itida i niyadu' nuheni, u O-cuo-ta-lu satipan a suo-tu, itida i Ta-si-yen dadipasan. (CPLP) . Li-se-pen u ginku, papacakayan, pasingbungay, nalimaan, kanatal nu sasiwbayan, cyawyi atu laliwkuan a satapangan, sipakayda i kitakit atu kanatalan nu tukay nikinkiwan tu wanlu "GaWC" a nihapuan " kitakit nu tukay" a nganganan, sipasilac u ALPHA-ci a kanatal nu tukay, u O-cuo-ta-lu a angangan nu tatelungan a sakaudip, Li-se-pen-kan u O-cuo-ta-si-yeng dadipasan nu satabakiay a minatuan. Namahida, Li-se-pen pahikukian itida i tusepcaywal mihcaah miala tu tusiwsepsep nu taydaay a tademaw, u Pu-taw-ya sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukiay, Yi-pi-li-pan-daw sakatulu nu sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukian atu O-cuo tu saka tusep nu sainai'ay nu lawdan a pahikukiay. (GaWC) ALPHA- . Li-se-pen u Na-o saka siwa nu taydaay musakamuay a satabakiay nu tukayan, mikilul tu Yi-se-tan-paw, Luo-ma, Pa-say-lung-na, Mi-lan, Ya-tin, Wi-ni-se, Ma-te-li atu Fuo-luo-lun-se, tusepcaywal mihcaan, Li-se-pen nu taydaay midang a tademaw makaala tu 3,539,400 ku tademaw. kitidaan nu Li-se-pen a GDP picakayan mikitalakaw tu Pu-taw-ya duma nu niyadu'an. pulung nu sakasilaculan 963 yi menyen. pulung nu siwkac saka sepat a bataan. Pu-taw-ya miawasay a kusi a hunbu itida namin i Li-se-pen niyadu'an. GDP . Li-se-pen i kitakit u satenesay a tukayan, saka tusa nu sumamaday nu O-cuo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu aydaay nu O-cuo matabal tu pina a se-ci a nikaadihan. picidekan u U-se. Kay-sa ku panganganay " Felicitas julia" imi u " palipahak Kay-sa" kainaian tu nu Luo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka lima a seci lingatu, Li-se-pen a silacan Ze-e-man niyadu' ku mikuwanay, nikuda sa itida i walu a secian hiyan nu Muo-e tademaw midebung, caycaysippic mihcaan, A-fan-suo ise debungan kina tukay, namakayda i Li-se-pen hida satu u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, sakaudip atu tatelungan nu lalangawan. "Felicitas Julia"(śĄŹÁāļ" . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ namaka sin-se-ci zitay malingatu, Li-se-pen a kitidaan idaw tuku Yi-pi-li tademaw tuda mueneng, satabalay a tayniay nu tademaw u Fei-ni-ci tademaw. yu tuseplim mihcaan u Luo-ma-kun-he-kuo ku mikuwanay, tayaay mikuwanay ci Kay-sa pacakaten nida kina kitidaan malase', pangangan han u "Felicitasjulia" imi u " kalipahak Kay-sa", nika makatukuh tu kunyen lima a seci kakilukilul sa debungan nu Man-cu. "Felicitas Julia" . . kunyen piccaycay mihcaan, namaka pea-fuy a Muo-e tademaw midebung i Yi-pi-li pantaw, midebung tu Li-se-pen. palutatengaan tu Tapangan u Yi-se-lan-cyaw a Muo-e tademaw itida i maci patideng tu yadahay nu Cin-cen-se, patideng tu yadahay nu lumaan atu baluhay a cabeng. pikuwanan nu Yi-se-lan-cyaw, macakat tu ku sakaudip nu macimacian, mila itiniay u tapang nu minatuan, imahini, macian nu tademaw caay namin kalecad ku palutatengaan tu Tapang idaw ku kilisetu, Mu-se-lin atu Yiw-tay tademaw. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉ711ŚĻī, . caycaysippic mihcaan, Pu-taw-ya kuowan ci A-fun mililid tu hitay mi'dis tu Muo-e- tademaw, u Li-se-pen mutiku aca tu kilisetu. caytulimnem mihcaan, Li-se-pen mula Pu-taw-ya a suo-tu, hida satu mapatideng mala O-cuo atu -Ti-cun-hay tapang nu tataydaan misiwbay a tukayan. i kitidaan katinengan, katuud ku paculilay tu nu bayu a balungaan pasu ci Wa-se-ke.D.Cya-ma-tu u Li-se-pen malingand katukuh i kitakit nu caayay kalecad nu tataydaan mitahaw, sisa, katukuh tu sabaw tu enem a seci sakacelakan ku Li-se-pen tayaw, yadahay nu kiman itawya namaka Pu-taw-ya a mabulaway nu tademw nu Pa-si katukuh i Li-se-pen, itini kasi'puca u kaysing ku masangaay, sisa u Li-se-pen mala O-cuo u tatelungan nu pacakayay. 1147ŚĻī, . caylimsepnem mihcaan sepat bulad sabaw siwa demiad, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu kawaw tu Yiw-tay tademaw a militabat, maala ku 4000 nu tademawan makaala tu palasepaten nu cacayay ku mapatayay nu Yiw-tay a tademawan. caylimlucay mihcaan cacay bulad tuenem demiad, idaw ku tabakiay nu ninel i Li-se-pen . caylimwalsep mihcaan Si-pan-ya Ha-pu-se-paw-wancaw mikuwan tu Pu-taw-ya wanwi miduduc malepacaw, u Si-pan-ya a hitay midebung tu Li-se-pen, Si-pan-ya kuowan ci Fuy-li-pu ese mikutay mala Pu-taw-ya a kuowan, misakaput u Si-pan-ya ti-kuo ku sikawaway a Kun-cu-lan-pan Yi-pi-li lenmun, ya lenmun sadikuday u Pu-taw-ya itida i caynemsipsep mihcaan misiteked sa mabulesak. 1506ŚĻī4śúą19śó•, . caypiclimlim mihcaan, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu ninelan i O-cuo makaala tu siw a ci nu pihacengay nu ninel, makatuduh atu cabiyasan nu bayu makaala tu cacay a bataan nu wang ku mapatayay a tademaw, picidekan i Li-se-pen idaw ku siwa a wangan nu tademaw a mapatay, u tukay atu minatu ku pihacengay, pasuLi-wi-la-kun atu singanganay nu tuudan, kiwkay, aadihan tu cudad a luma' u luma' tu, kanahatu nu caayay ka luyuh nu ninelan ku lumaa' sadikuday caay tu pakaput tu lamal a nipipesengan, hida satu ku Li-se-pen a caay tu lekal, Pu-taw-ya kanatal hida satu malingatu a nai' ku laheci. 1755ŚĻī, . nipatidengan tu nadikudan a Li-se-pen, misaahebal tu putah, dadan, u Kuo-wan atu Suo-sin miawda tu katuuday nu misangaay tu luma' atu matinengay mikulitay patideng tu tatelungan nu maci, nika hini pabaluhay mikiyaku tu tukay, patideng tu baluhay a Pan-pa-e-se nu sangaan hidan u wayway nu lala' a misanga tu talakaw apuyu nu silacan, u Luo-ke-ke atu Sin-ku-ten cuyi ku sapatumi', nika sadayumen, palacacay han nu hakuna, nipisangaan tu lumaan kacan pacukedan tu sakacaay ka talaw nu ninelan. . sabaw siwa tu lingatu, ci Na-puo'-lun yise palekal tu pantaw kalepacawan midis tu Si-pan-ya atu Pu-taw-ya, Fa-kuo hitay mialaw tu Ma-te-li katukuh i Li-se-pen, tawyaay a tahudan yada tu namin milaliw taydan i Pa-si, u macimacian mamin tu a mapeci malawpes.caysiwcaysep mihecaan cacay a bataaan bulad tulu demiad, Li-se-pen palekal tu nikalepacawan, belihen ku cun-cu-ce, lima demiad kun-he-tan tademaw itida i Li-se-pen mihapu mapatineng tu ku Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo. sakatusa nu nikalepacawan, Li-se-pen mibuhat tu adidiay nu Ta-si-yeng minatu a tukayan. ayda u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, tatelungan nu lalangawan, satabakiay nu minatuan atu satabakiay nu tukayan. Śú®19šłĖÁīÄŚąĚ, . caysiwpicsip mihcaan Li-se-pen mapalekal ku Kan-nay-si kemin, mapatideng tu ku Pu-taw-ya a lihalayay. caysiwwallu mihcaan, Pei-lun-ta atu Ze-nuo-ni-muo siwtawyen mala kitakit nu nababalakian a lalangawan. caysiwsiwwal mihcaan, sikawaw ku Li-se-pen tu kitakit nu Pu-lan-huy, sapatingakay u " bayu, anu ayaway a zaysang", pasitungus tu Li-se-pen bayuay a tukayan. nipatingakay nu Puo-lan-huy caylutu demiad, pulung han nu tadaay a tademaw makaala tu cacay a malebut ku taydaay miadih. 1974 .
S.PHON: == r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn *** == r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn " kamu nu pu-taw-ja "r~…ĺisboa(r~…ĺi* Ē~ °bo*) , u pu- ¶in, pu-taw-ja-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a suotu atu satabakiaj nu tukaj, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺasińßu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺumaan. kakitidaan itida i pu-taw-ja t…ôban timur~…ĺan nu ta-si-j…ôŇč dadipasan, tukaj nu amis u sin-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa buju Ē~ °, timur~…ĺan nu tukaj u t…ô Ē~ °-zu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu tatańßkar~…ĺan, atu r~…ĺun-tun, pa-r~…ĺi, r~…ĺuo-ma sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u si-o sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…ĺikisian a tukajan. kitidaan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian ***.** pin-fan-kun-r~…ĺi, tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw. pasu wi-sin- ¶…ôn a tukajan nu tad…ômaw mar~…ĺakuujt tu *** waŇč nu tad…ômawan, mańßida u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw a **%. ajda atu puo-…ô-tu masur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad u pu-taw-ja nu tusaaj a dajńßiwan nu tukaj. r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn u tukaj atu ¶…ô- ¶ja-s…ô, u kakitidaan nu sińßu atu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tapan a kanatar~…ĺ. pu-taw-ja-ji kanatar~…ĺ kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu ńßunbu itida i nijadu Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…ĺu satipan a suo-tu, itida i ta-si-j…ôn dadipasan. ( ¶pr~…ĺp) . r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn u ginku, papa ¶akajan, pasiŇčbuŇčaj, nar~…ĺimaan, kanatar~…ĺ nu sasiwbajan, ¶jawji atu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwkuan a satapaŇčan, sipakajda i kitakit atu kanatar~…ĺan nu tukaj nikinkiwan tu wanr~…ĺu "gaw ¶" a nińßapuan " kitakit nu tukaj" a ŇčaŇčanan, sipasir~…ĺa ¶ u ar~…ĺpńßa- ¶i a kanatar~…ĺ nu tukaj, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…ĺu a aŇčaŇčan nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan a sakaudip, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn-kan u o- ¶uo-ta-si-j…ôŇč dadipasan nu satabakiaj a minatuan. namańßida, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn pańßikukian itida i tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aańß miar~…ĺa tu tusiws…ôps…ôp nu tajdaaj a tad…ômaw, u pu-taw-ja sanaiaj nu r~…ĺawadan a pańßikukiaj, ji-pi-r~…ĺi-pan-daw sakatur~…ĺu nu sanaiaj nu r~…ĺawadan a pańßikukian atu o- ¶uo tu saka tus…ôp nu sainai Ē~ °aj nu r~…ĺawdan a pańßikukiaj. (gaw ¶) ar~…ĺpńßa- . r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn u na-o saka siwa nu tajdaaj musakamuaj a satabakiaj nu tukajan, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ji-s…ô-tan-paw, r~…ĺuo-ma, pa-saj-r~…ĺuŇč-na, mi-r~…ĺan, ja-tin, wi-ni-s…ô, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi atu fuo-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺun-s…ô, tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn nu tajdaaj midaŇč a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw. kitidaan nu r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a gdp pi ¶akajan mikitar~…ĺakaw tu pu-taw-ja duma nu nijadu Ē~ °an. pur~…ĺuŇč nu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan *** ji m…ônj…ôn. pur~…ĺuŇč nu siwka ¶ saka s…ôpat a bataan. pu-taw-ja miawasaj a kusi a ńßunbu itida namin i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an. gdp . r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn i kitakit u sat…ôn…ôsaj a tukajan, saka tusa nu sumamadaj nu o- ¶uo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu ajdaaj nu o- ¶uo matabar~…ĺ tu pina a s…ô- ¶i a nikaadińßan. pi ¶id…ôkan u u-s…ô. kaj-sa ku paŇčaŇčanaj " f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itas jur~…ĺia" imi u " par~…ĺipańßak kaj-sa" kainaian tu nu r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶i r~…ĺiŇčatu, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a sir~…ĺa ¶an z…ô-…ô-man nijadu Ē~ ° ku mikuwanaj, nikuda sa itida i war~…ĺu a s…ô ¶ian ńßijan nu muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč, ¶aj ¶ajsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan, a-fan-suo is…ô d…ôbuŇčan kina tukaj, namakajda i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn ńßida satu u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. "f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itas *ur~…ĺia"(**" . r~…ĺikisi ** namaka sin-s…ô- ¶i zitaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a kitidaan idaw tuku ji-pi-r~…ĺi tad…ômaw tuda mu…ôn…ôŇč, satabar~…ĺaj a tajniaj nu tad…ômaw u f…ôi-ni- ¶i tad…ômaw. ju tus…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan u r~…ĺuo-ma-kun-ńß…ô-kuo ku mikuwanaj, tajaaj mikuwanaj ¶i kaj-sa pa ¶akat…ôn nida kina kitidaan mar~…ĺas…ô Ē~ °, paŇčaŇčan ńßan u "f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itasjur~…ĺia" imi u " kar~…ĺipańßak kaj-sa", nika makatukuńß tu kunj…ôn r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶i kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa d…ôbuŇčan nu man- ¶u. "f…ôr~…ĺi ¶itas *ur~…ĺia" . . kunj…ôn pi ¶ ¶aj ¶aj mińß ¶aan, namaka p…ôa-fuj a muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč i ji-pi-r~…ĺi pantaw, mid…ôbuŇč tu r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn. par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu tapaŇčan u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw a muo-…ô tad…ômaw itida i ma ¶i patid…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô, patid…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu r~…ĺumaan atu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ¶ab…ôŇč. pikuwanan nu ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw, ma ¶akat tu ku sakaudip nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, mir~…ĺa itiniaj u tapaŇč nu minatuan, imańßini, ma ¶ian nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu tapaŇč idaw ku kir~…ĺis…ôtu, mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin atu jiw-taj r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mur~…ĺa pu-taw-ja a suo-tu, ńßida satu mapatid…ôŇč mar~…ĺa o- ¶uo atu -ti- ¶un-ńßaj tapaŇč nu tatajdaan misiwbaj a tukajan. i kitidaan katin…ôŇčan, katuud ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu nu baju r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mar~…ĺa o- ¶uo u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu pa ¶akajaj. *****, . ¶ajr~…ĺims…ôpn…ôm mińß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…ĺad sabaw siwa d…ômiad, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku tabakiaj nu kawaw tu jiw-taj tad…ômaw a mir~…ĺitabat, maar~…ĺa ku **** nu tad…ômawan makaar~…ĺa tu par~…ĺas…ôpat…ôn nu ¶a ¶ajaj ku mapatajaj nu jiw-taj a tad…ômawan. ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad tu…ôn…ôm d…ômiad, idaw ku r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn, si-pan-ja kuowan ¶i fuj-r~…ĺi-pu …ôs…ô mikutaj mar~…ĺa pu-taw-ja a kuowan, misakaput u si-pan-ja ti-kuo ku sikawawaj a kun- ¶u-r~…ĺan-pan ji-pi-r~…ĺi r~…ĺ…ônmun, ja r~…ĺ…ônmun sadikudaj u pu-taw-ja itida i ¶ajn…ômsips…ôp mińß ¶aan misit…ôk…ôd sa mabur~…ĺ…ôsak. **********, . ¶ajpi ¶r~…ĺimr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku tabakiaj nu nin…ôr~…ĺan i o- ¶uo makaar~…ĺa tu siw a ¶i nu pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu nin…ôr~…ĺ, makatuduńß atu ¶abijasan nu baju makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu waŇč ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, pi ¶id…ôkan i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku siwa a waŇčan nu tad…ômaw a mapataj, u tukaj atu minatu ku pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj, pasur~…ĺi-wi-r~…ĺa-kun atu siŇčaŇčanaj nu tuudan, kiwkaj, aadińßan tu ¶udad a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu, kanańßatu nu ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺujuńß nu nin…ôr~…ĺan ku r~…ĺumaa Ē~ ° sadikudaj ¶aaj tu pakaput tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ a nipip…ôs…ôŇčan, ńßida satu ku r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn a ¶aaj tu r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, pu-taw-ja kanatar~…ĺ ńßida satu mar~…ĺiŇčatu a nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. *****, . nipatid…ôŇčan tu nadikudan a r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn, misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu putańß, dadan, u kuo-wan atu suo-sin miawda tu katuudaj nu misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu matin…ôŇčaj mikur~…ĺitaj patid…ôŇč tu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶i, nika ńßini pabar~…ĺuńßaj mikijaku tu tukaj, patid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a pan-pa-…ô-s…ô nu saŇčaan ńßidan u wajwaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a misaŇča tu tar~…ĺakaw apuju nu sir~…ĺa ¶an, u r~…ĺuo-k…ô-k…ô atu sin-ku-t…ôn ¶uji ku sapatumi Ē~ °, nika sadajum…ôn, par~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj ńßan nu ńßakuna, nipisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺumaan ka ¶an pa ¶uk…ôdan tu saka ¶aaj ka tar~…ĺaw nu nin…ôr~…ĺan. . sabaw siwa tu r~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶i na-puo Ē~ °-r~…ĺun jis…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu pantaw kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan midis tu si-pan-ja atu pu-taw-ja, fa-kuo ńßitaj miar~…ĺaw tu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi katukuńß i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn, tawjaaj a tańßudan jada tu namin mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajdan i pa-si, u ma ¶ima ¶ian mamin tu a map…ô ¶i mar~…ĺawp…ôs. ¶ajsiw ¶ajs…ôp mińß…ô ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataaan bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu d…ômiad, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, b…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn ku ¶un- ¶u- ¶…ô, r~…ĺima d…ômiad kun-ńß…ô-tan tad…ômaw itida i r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mińßapu mapatin…ôŇč tu ku pu-taw-ja-kun-ńß…ô-kuo. sakatusa nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mibuńßat tu adidiaj nu ta-si-j…ôŇč minatu a tukajan. ajda u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, satabakiaj nu minatuan atu satabakiaj nu tukajan. ******, . ¶ajsiwpi ¶sip mińß ¶aan r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku kan-naj-si k…ômin, mapatid…ôŇč tu ku pu-taw-ja a r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj. ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, p…ôi-r~…ĺun-ta atu z…ô-nuo-ni-muo siwtawj…ôn mar~…ĺa kitakit nu nababar~…ĺakian a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ¶ajsiwsiwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, sikawaw ku r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn tu kitakit nu pu-r~…ĺan-ńßuj, sapatiŇčakaj u " baju, anu ajawaj a zajsaŇč", pasituŇčus tu r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn bajuaj a tukajan. nipatiŇčakaj nu puo-r~…ĺan-ńßuj ¶ajr~…ĺutu d…ômiad, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan nu tadaaj a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku tajdaaj miadińß. **** .
